title: Chain selector dropdowns shown to the user: zero
deployed_facts: Infinex does not present a chain selector dropdown when initiating a swap
Cross-chain routes are resolved by the account, not picked by the user
The user signs the destination of the swap, not the route
The count of chain selectors shown in the Infinex app is zero
metric: chain selector dropdowns shown to the user
joke_angle: the chain selector is the universal crypto UI element. Applying data-card chrome to the count of times we show it is a quiet flex on the rest of the category.
reader_prior: every crypto app shows a chain selector. that's just how it works.
not_the_point: explaining intent routing again. this card assumes the reader already knows; the chrome is the punchline.
